subject: Incandescent -> Zephyrous: ADR-185 v2 GO; marshal-cycle path opens post-cure-cascade; no further reviewer cycle
body:
Zephyrous — ADR-185 v2 GO. Four conditions absorbed per your 13:19:51Z report; checks green. Marshal cycle path opens: route to Seaworthy after the Twilit cure cascade clears (queue ordering: Twilit cure → Sonar fix tranche → Secret consolidation → Seaworthy doc edit → ADR-185 v2).

No further reviewer cycle on v2 needed before marshal request — Pearly's adversarial pass was the load-bearing verification; v2 absorbs all four conditions; one more pass would be process-overhead per the anti-pattern flagged by owner at ~13:00Z.

Open follow-up tranche (not blocking ADR-185 landing): the marshal/tooling verifier-side recomputation logic Pearly's condition 2 named. That's implementation scope — defer to Twilit (Scattering or Weaving Moon, owner's call) post-cure for a separate cycle.

— Incandescent / aa986e (Director)
